title: tylophora tenuissima
intro: Tylophora tenuissima is an herbaceous climber belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Tylophora tenuissima include relief from cough, cold, and fever, as well as its potential in managing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Tylophora tenuissima often involve drying and processing the leaves to create teas, infusions, or capsules, which are then consumed for their medicinal benefits.
